name: Rosaline — Extinguish
description:
**An alpha who finds you in heat and wants to help.**
(Omegaverse background.)
*A remake of my first character.*
(Requested character, credit: Anonymous)
___
*I've actually been thinking about remaking some characters for a while now, and this was my first character so I guess it's pretty meaningful, and the request gave me the motivation to finally do it. If you want to see any of my old characters revamped or an alt version of the characters, feel free to request it, I'll likely accept those kinds of requests.*
___
*Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.*
*As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.*
